column21: AI Threat Analysis Unit Automated Incident Response System   REPORT GENERATION STATUS: COMPLETEDThe following document has been compiled based on analytical data points provided during the current analyst session. System integration with threat intelligence databases confirmed the attribution based on the provided indicators.   Incident Report: Killnet Group – Attack Summary   Detection & Analysis  Following the identification of critical server load, investigation confirmed a SYN flood attack (DoS). The malicious traffic originated from the device with IP address 45.155.204.18. Cross-referencing this indicator with threat intelligence feeds attributes this activity to the Killnet Group threat actor group.    Containment & Mitigation  Per analyst directive, the compromised device was immediately isolated via IP blocklisting. This decisive action halted the malicious traffic. Firewall rules have been updated to prevent recurrence.    Outcome  The attack was successfully mitigated based on the rapid response actions. System integrity has been restored; no data exfiltration was detected.     🛡️ Actionable Intelligence & Exportable Data  This report contains verified Indicators of Compromise (IoCs) valuable for external organizations. Purchasing/Sharing this intelligence allows other networks to:   	Pre-emptively Block: Add the identified attacker IP (45.155.204.18) to global blocklists to prevent future attacks. 	Update Firewalls: Deploy the specific signature for "Killnet Group" identified in this analysis. 	Enhance Defense: Use the attacker profile to patch vulnerabilities before they are exploited elsewhere.    Report Classification: CONFIDENTIALVerified and compiled by the AI Threat Analysis Unit based on analyst inputs.
